description:
# Why

bl-f37b added a cross-repo delivery cache under `.balls/code-refs/<sha1>.git`
materialized on `bl show --resolve-remote`. It is not added to
`store_init::ensure_main_gitignore`'s wanted list, nor to
`review_safety::RUNTIME_PATHS`. Today this is mostly harmless because nothing
creates the cache without `--resolve-remote`, but:

- A non-bare repo where an operator opts in once will have an untracked
  `.balls/code-refs/` tree. A subsequent `git add -A` (or a worktree-side
  script that does the same) silently commits a forge clone into the
  project â€” exactly the failure mode the bl-7523 `delivered_repo` write
  side was trying to *avoid* bloating the integration branch with.
- The runtime-paths safety net in `bl review` (`commit_touches_runtime` +
  `runtime_in_squash_error`) already covers the analogous `.balls/local`,
  `.balls/tasks`, `.balls/worktree`. Adding `.balls/code-refs` is the
  same shape â€” defense in depth at squash time even if the gitignore is
  stale from a pre-bl-f37b `bl init`.

# Scope

- `store_init::ensure_main_gitignore`: include `.balls/code-refs` in the
  non-stealth `wanted` list (mirrors `.balls/worktree`).
- `review_safety::RUNTIME_PATHS`: add `.balls/code-refs` so a sneaked-in
  cache is rejected at review time.
- A unit test in `review_safety_tests.rs` confirming a commit touching
  `.balls/code-refs/foo.git/HEAD` is flagged by `commit_touches_runtime`.
- Repos that already ran `bl init` before this lands won't get the
  gitignore line auto-added â€” that's the existing migration story
  (`bl init` is idempotent-ish, an operator can re-run it). Document
  briefly in the commit body; no migration code.

# Out of scope

`.balls/state-repo` (bl-ffb4) has the same shape and the same gap. It is
*also* not gitignored and not in RUNTIME_PATHS. Probably worth folding in,
but it predates this ball â€” file separately if so, or extend this ball's
scope explicitly. Default: do code-refs only and note the parallel gap
in the commit body.

# Origin

Follow-up from the bl-f37b review pass â€” flagged but deferred to keep
that ball scoped to the read-side resolver.
title: Gitignore + runtime-paths cover .balls/code-refs
